## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and set up contracts for new hires on Upwork, focusing on payment structure and project rates.](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Three new hires starting next week, including Bridget (starting 2/17), require contract setup in Remote](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [Upwork contracts typically use fixed-price project rates rather than hourly rates to avoid ambiguity](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Current budget constraint: $600/month max for each contractor](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Need to confirm with Marcel about Bridget's salary: $16,000/month vs. $8,000/month (semi-monthly payment structure unclear)](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

## Topics

### New Hire Contract Setup

  - [Three new hires starting next week need contracts in Remote](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [Bridget's start date confirmed for February 17th](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [Salary information found in PandaDoc: $16,000 per month, semi-monthly payments](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Equity and benefits details available but not relevant for Remote contract](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)

### Upwork Contract Configuration

  - [Attempted to set up hourly contracts: $17/hour, 5 hours/week, $340/month](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Realized fixed-price project rates are preferred over hourly rates](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Example: $200 for generating 25 images for a client](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)
  - [Fixed-price structure provides clarity on deliverables and payment](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)

### Budget Constraints

  - [Maximum budget: $600/month per contractor](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Need to adjust contract terms to fit within budget while maintaining fair compensation](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)

### Process Uncertainty

  - [Both Wiets and Molly learning the Upwork contract setup process in real-time](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [Difficulty finding new hires in Upwork system, may need to manually add them](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Consult with Jimmy about specific project scopes and fixed-price rates for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Adjust Upwork contracts to fixed-price model instead of hourly rates](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Complete Remote contract setup for Bridget before her 2/17 start date](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [Follow up on Slack channel for Jimmy's response on contract structure](https://fathom.video/share/YfYbXsFith4ppYhtmawuh578JimTXsvs?tab=summary&timestamp=2087.0)
